services_section.label: THE WASH
services_section.heading: Every Surface Gets The Angel Treatment
services_section.subheading: From green-stained siding to black driveways, we bring it all back to life

services.title: House Washing
services.description: Remove years of grime, mold, and weather stains from your siding. Your house will look brand new again.

services.title: Driveway Cleaning
services.description: Concrete and asphalt restoration that makes your driveway the brightest on the block.

services.title: Patio & Walkway Revival
services.description: Front and back patios, stairs, and walkways cleaned to original condition.

services.title: Full Property Service
services.description: Complete exterior cleaning packages for two-story homes and all outdoor surfaces.

about.heading: The Gastonia Team That Shows Up Tomorrow
about.body: When you call Angel-Jet, you get Angel. Real person answering the phone, next-day service, and prices that make sense.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Gastonia Says About Our Work

reviews.name: Tamekia T.
reviews.text: Angel-Jet did an excellent job on my house. Should be a while before HOA tries to hit me up again.

reviews.name: Oscar H.
reviews.text: Very impressed with the job they did. Our concrete is so bright it glows in the dark! House is incredibly clean.

reviews.name: Shevonn H.
reviews.text: Called and Angel accommodated pressure washing my house the very next day. Very satisfied with price and service.
